ddls:
CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "air_quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring site */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pollutant */,
  "poc" INTEGER /* Point of contact for the site */,
  "daily_max_1_hour_so2_concentration" REAL /* Daily maximum 1-hour SO2 concentration */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the concentration (e.g., ppb) */,
  "daily_aqi_value" INTEGER /* Daily AQI value */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "data_validity" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the data is valid */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last modified */,
  "aqs_parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AQS parameter */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("air_quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_aqs_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("aqs_parameter_id") REFERENCES aqs_parameters ("aqs_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "cbsa_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the CBSA code */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* CBSA name */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state */,
  "state" TEXT /* State name */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "county" TEXT /* County name */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "site_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the site (e.g., email, phone) */,
  "site_established_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_cbsa_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa_code_id") REFERENCES cbsa_codes ("cbsa_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant (e.g., Sulfur dioxide) */,
  "aqs_parameter_code" INTEGER /* AQS parameter code */,
  "aqs_parameter_desc" TEXT /* AQS parameter description */,
  "pollutant_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the pollutant */,
  "pollutant_category" TEXT /* Category of the pollutant (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutants_aqs_parameter_code FOREIGN KEY ("aqs_parameter_code") REFERENCES aqs_parameters ("aqs_parameter_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., AQS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "data_source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., ppb) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representation of the unit (e.g., ppb, μg/m³) */,
  "unit_conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit (e.g., 1 ppb = 2.86 μg/m³) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aqs_parameters" (
  "aqs_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AQS parameter */,
  "aqs_parameter_code" INTEGER /* AQS parameter code */,
  "aqs_parameter_desc" TEXT /* AQS parameter description */,
  "aqs_parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., air quality, meteorological) */,
  "aqs_parameter_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aqs_parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbsa_codes" (
  "cbsa_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CBSA code */,
  "cbsa_code" INTEGER /* CBSA code */,
  "cbsa_name" TEXT /* CBSA name */,
  "cbsa_type" TEXT /* Type of CBSA (e.g., metropolitan, micropolitan) */,
  "cbsa_population" INTEGER /* Population of the CBSA area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" INTEGER /* State code */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* State name */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state (e.g., DC, CA) */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_code" INTEGER /* County code */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* County name */,
  "county_type" TEXT /* Type of county (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role (foreign key to user_roles) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, IT) */,
  "user_registered_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "air_quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_air_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("air_quality_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("air_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "air_quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_air_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("air_quality_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("air_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "air_quality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the air quality data the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "readme_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the readme file for data integrity */,
  "readme_version" INTEGER /* Version of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_air_quality_id FOREIGN KEY ("air_quality_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("air_quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
